---
title: Calculus Applications
description: Rates, accumulation, optimization, and modeling.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Choose derivatives for rate problems.
- Choose integrals for accumulation problems.
- Connect calculus to quantitative modeling.
:::

## Choosing the Tool

Use derivatives when the question asks about change at an instant. Use
integrals when the question asks about total accumulation over an interval.

::: {.key-idea}
Derivative: local change. Integral: accumulated change.
:::

## Practice

::: {.practice-box}
1. Marginal cost is a derivative or an integral?
2. Total distance from velocity is a derivative or an integral?
3. Maximum profit usually requires which calculus tool first?
:::
